name: Seattle Gold
description_short: Seattle Gold is a credit repair provider based in Seattle, Washington. Rated 5.0/5 with 598 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Seattle Gold is a credit repair provider serving clients in Seattle, Washington. With 598 Google reviews and a 5.0/5.0 rating, Seattle Gold has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a coin dealer, diamond buyer, diamond dealer, Seattle Gold provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Seattle, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Seattle Gold operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Seattle, Washington area who are considering Seattle Gold should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
